blocks.text: UNIVERSITY TIMETABLE OPTIMIZATION SYSTEM
(UTOS)
System Sequence Diagrams
UC00 through UC22
By: Muhammad Hammad Shakeel
Software Engineering Project
Generated: 15 May 2026
Introduction

This document presents the System Sequence Diagrams (SSDs) for all 23 use cases identified in the UTOS Use Case Analysis. Each SSD illustrates the interactions between external actors and the UTOS system boundary for the main success scenario of each use case, derived from the uploaded generator metadata and organized in the same UC00–UC22 sequence.
Notation Key
•  Solid arrow  →  System operation message (initiator → system)
•  Dashed arrow  ⇢  System response / return value
•  Vertical dashed line  =  Actor / object lifeline
•  Stick figure  =  Human actor / user role
•  Named box  =  System or subsystem actor
Use Case Index

rows: UC12 — View Personal or Section Timetable  [Class Timetabling]
UC04 — Define Constraints and Preferences  [Class Timetabling]
UC07 — Manually Adjust and Lock Timetable  [Class Timetabling]
UC20 — View Exam Schedule and Invigilation Duties  [Exam Timetabling]
UC09 — Approve or Reject Change Request  [Class Timetabling]
UC22 — View System Reports and Audit Logs  [Administration]
